summary: Tested 3 new EYV features: Amadeus mock booking (flights/hotels/bookings CRUD), Travel Wallet (Emergent Object Storage upload/list/download/soft-delete), and OpenStreetMap coords lookup. 20/20 backend tests passed (test_new_features.py). Frontend UI verified: Dashboard quick-action tiles, Booking page (Flights/Hotels/My Bookings tabs), flight search (6 cards), hotel search (8 cards), booking confirmation modal, wallet upload end-to-end (3 items visible, category counts correct).

minor.issue: category/title/description/trip_id are declared without Form(...), so FastAPI treats them as QUERY params instead of multipart form fields. Frontend works because it sends them as query params via URLSearchParams, but this is an unconventional contract and silently drops any multipart form fields. Consider switching to Form(...) and updating frontend to use formData.append for consistency.

issues: Departure/arrival times sometimes show same time when duration > 24h due to modulo 24 wrap in mock (e.g. 16:30 -> 04:30 for 12h30m flight is correct, but cosmetically the date isn't incremented). Cosmetic only.

action_items: (LOW) Consider declaring wallet upload metadata fields with Form(...) and updating frontend to send via FormData instead of URLSearchParams query params - currently works but unconventional.

(NICE-TO-HAVE) Live TripMap UI test was skipped because no trip existed for the test user and AI trip generation takes ~60s; backend coord endpoint is verified, and TripMap.jsx is wired with leaflet correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is approaching 717 lines - consider extracting booking/wallet routes to separate routers (e.g. routers/booking.py, routers/wallet.py).
Wallet upload form params use query string not multipart form fields - unconventional REST API design; not a bug since contract is consistent end-to-end.
Mock flight arrival time uses modulo 24 (`(dep_hour + duration_hours) % 24`) without incrementing date - flights >24h hop back to same date, minor cosmetic.

amadeus_service.search_hotels has dead code: real-API branch still calls _generate_mock_hotels (lines 234-237). When AMADEUS_USE_MOCK is false, hotels will still be mock - acknowledge in TODO or implement real call.

storage_service uses synchronous `requests` library inside async FastAPI endpoint (put_object, get_object). For larger files this will block the event loop. Consider httpx async or run in thread pool.
All new endpoints correctly use `{"_id": 0}` projection and proper auth via get_current_user - good.
Good: wallet download endpoint supports both cookie auth and ?auth= query param for direct tag access.
seed_data_creation: Created wallet items via tests (TEST_ prefixed and one 'TEST_E2E_BoardingPass' via UI) - 3 total in test user's wallet. Created 2 bookings via UI flow (Delta DE306 confirmed; one cancelled in pytest lifecycle).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new endpoints (search/flights, search/hotels, destinations/{x}/coords, bookings CRUD, wallet upload/list/download/delete) pass auth + happy path + 404 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py. Use SESSION token test_session_eyv_1780670554293. Wallet upload contract: file as multipart, but category/title/description/trip_id as QUERY params (NOT form fields) - matches the frontend. TripMap component uses react-leaflet and renders correctly; was not visually verified because test user has no trips and AI trip generation takes ~60s.
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found. The only design concern (wallet upload using query params for metadata) is functional end-to-end and matches the frontend contract.
